# Grewal RE Group
> Shivraj Grewal is a licensed real estate agent in Austin, TX. Brand: Grewal RE Group. Brokerage: Compass. Email: shivraj.grewal@compass.com. Phone: (512) 617-0001. Market: Austin and surrounding Travis, Williamson, and Hays counties.

## About
Shivraj Grewal helps buyers, sellers, and investors in Austin, TX. His approach is relationship-first: educate, clarify, recommend, next step. He is known for straight answers and honest analysis.

## Calculators
Free interactive calculators for Austin real estate decisions. Data defaults are Austin-specific (Travis County property tax 1.95%, current market rates).

- [Home Affordability Calculator](https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/affordability-calculator): How much home can you afford in Austin based on income, debts, and DTI limits.
- [Mortgage / PITI Calculator](https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/mortgage-calculator): Monthly principal, interest, taxes, and insurance with full amortization table.
- [Rent vs Buy Calculator](https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/rent-vs-buy): Total cost comparison over a chosen period including equity buildup.
- [Rate Buydown Calculator](https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/buy-down-calculator): 2/1 and 3/2/1 temporary buydown cost and monthly savings.

## Machine-readable calculator manifest
JSON: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/index.json
